mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT -1 AS PARENT_STORAGE_IDX, 0 AS STORAGE_IDX, '보관함' AS STORAGE_NAME FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT PARENT_STORAGE_IDX, STORAGE_IDX, STORAGE_NAME FROM MY_STORAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key} ) CONNECT BY PRIOR STORAGE_IDX = PARENT_STORAGE_IDX START WITH STORAGE_IDX = 0 ORDER SIBLINGS BY STORAGE_NAME
SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, STORAGE_IDX, PARENT_STORAGE_IDX, STORAGE_NAME FROM MY_STORAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key} AND STORAGE_IDX = #{storage_idx}
